name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Expiry tracking — data layer. New product_batches table (multiple dated batches per slot for short-life products), a perishable flag on products, batch get/set endpoints, a fleet "expiring soon" pull-list scoped to the operator, an alert-days setting, and a public /api/v1/debug/expiry endpoint. Operator-facing only — no kiosk change in v1; dashboard screens land next.
